title: Floor 3: Pillar Recognition
purpose: Practice seeing the same state through Z9 pillar lenses.

questions.prompt: He says he wants trust, but acts like nobody can be trusted. Which pillar lens best explains the split?
questions.hint: Dissonance shows a split between stated value and performed behavior.

questions.prompt: A player keeps going because the goal is personally meaningful, not because of praise. Which Course 10/Z9 lens is strongest?
questions.hint: Course 10 emphasizes internal drive for long-term sustainability.

questions.prompt: The character notices urgency rising, pauses, and chooses a clearer response. Which lens is visible?
questions.hint: Self-regulation means managing behavior and emotion toward consistency.
